title: Global white text styling across all pages/sections

requirements.summary: Force all visible website text to render in white across all home sections and routed pages (including Auditions, Food Booth details, Haunted Houses, and Scare Zones).
acceptanceCriteria: All headings, paragraphs, labels, and body copy on the home sections and all routed pages display as white text.
Auditions page banner text and fetched audition link text render in white.
Food booth detail pages (e.g., Slider Doom / Sharks Hell) render their titles, descriptions, menu text, and navigation text in white.
Scare zone and haunted house content text renders in white.
No backend changes are required for this styling update.

file_operations.description: Add a global base-layer text color override so all rendered text (including elements styled via Tailwind text-* utility classes like text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, text-destructive, etc.) displays white site-wide; include coverage for common text elements (headings/paragraphs/labels/links/list items) and form text/placeholder text. Ensure this is implemented as a text-color-only override (use CSS specificity/!important where needed) without changing any backgrounds. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Ensure the white-text update does not alter any backgrounds, overlays, or background media; only text color is adjusted.
acceptanceCriteria: Background colors, overlays, and media remain visually the same as before the update (no intentional darkening/lightening or palette shifts).
Only text color is changed/overridden to white.

file_operations.description: Implement the global white text rules in a way that does not touch background-related styles (no bg-* utilities, no --background variable changes, no overlay/gradient/background-image edits); limit changes strictly to color/fill/stroke where applicable for text rendering. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
